emptyState.title: No jobs to apply to yet
emptyState.description: Collect jobs from LinkedIn first, then come back here to apply automatically.

controls.title: Application Controls
controls.loginInfo: Login: A browser will open and check LinkedIn & Gmail. If you're not logged in, the agent will wait for you to log in manually — then proceed automatically.
controls.limitHelp: Leave blank to apply to all {{count}} pending jobs

comingSoon.title: Tailored Resumes
comingSoon.description: Auto-customize your resume for each job by extracting skills from the job description.
